brand.title: Pilot Trax
brand.description: The main source for preparing for pilot and aviation exams

hero.description: Experience real booklet questions with detailed explanations, personal assessment, and smart review scheduling. Everything you need for guaranteed success in school and organization exams in one platform.
hero.subtitle: Suitable for domestic and immigrant pilots.

card.title: Exam Simulator
card.description: An environment with a full explanation of each question + three levels of assessment — for faster learning and targeted review.

features.title: Unique Features
features.description: Better learning experience with smart tools and modern design

items.title: Question Explanation
items.text: Each question is accompanied by a complete analysis of the options and the reasons for their correctness/incorrectness.

items.title: Colored Personal Assessment
items.text: Choosing green/yellow/red allows the system to recognize your learning level.

items.title: Smart Review Program
items.text: Focus on critical questions to save time and increase the chances of passing.

howTo.title: How does Pilot Trax work? — Fast, Smart, and Targeted
howTo.description: A combination of real questions, analytical explanations, and a personalized review plan to achieve maximum efficiency in the shortest time. Each step is designed to make your learning systematic and measurable.
howTo.quality_assurance: Quality Assurance: Continuous updating of questions and educational support to improve your score.
howTo.steps_description: Each step is accompanied by practical tips and time expectations to reach the goal.

steps.title: Simulator with Real Questions
steps.description: Take tests in an environment similar to the main exam with step-by-step explanations for each option to understand the concepts more precisely.

steps.title: Personalized Color-coded Assessment
steps.description: With simple tagging, the system identifies strengths and weaknesses and provides visual output to focus on sensitive topics.

steps.title: Smart Review Program
steps.description: Our algorithm creates prioritized review sessions based on your assessment to achieve the most progress in the shortest time.

steps.title: Track Progress and Reports
steps.description: Analytical reports, progress charts, and practical suggestions show you where to invest the most time to get definite results.

items.title: Free
items.description: Suitable for beginners and those who want to get acquainted with the platform. Basic features for initial assessment and introductory testing.
features: View sample explanations for a few questions

items.title: Standard
items.description: Suitable for students who need full access to the question bank and smart review. A balance of price and features for serious study.
features: Full access to the question bank

items.title: Professional
items.description: Suitable for professionals and centers that need advanced reports, offline courses, and priority support.
features: Offline courses and notes for download

items.name: Reza M.
items.testimonial: “With Pilot Trax, I was able to prepare for the organization's exam in two months. The explanation of the questions was excellent, and each option was explained in detail.”

items.name: Sara K.
items.testimonial: “The color-coded review system was exactly what I needed. It helped me quickly find my weaknesses and focus only on sensitive topics.”

items.name: Arian D.
items.testimonial: “The question bank was complete and realistic. The test-taking experience was exactly like the main exam, and I went into the exam with confidence.”

items.question: Are the questions real and up-to-date?
items.answer: Yes, the questions are collected from real booklets and are constantly updated.

items.question: How does smart review work?
items.answer: By selecting the green/yellow/red status, the system creates a special review program for you to focus on your weaknesses.

items.question: Is there a free trial?
items.answer: Yes, after signing up, you will receive a free test to get acquainted with the platform's functionality.

items.question: Can I track my progress?
items.answer: Yes, detailed reports and progress charts help you to check your performance.

items.question: What educational support is there?
items.answer: Our support team is ready to answer questions and guide you to make the best use of the platform.

items.question: Is it suitable for immigrants?
items.answer: Yes, our resources are designed for both domestic and immigrant pilots.

items.question: Can I cancel my subscription?
items.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time without any additional penalty.

items.question: How much time is needed to see results?
items.answer: It depends on your effort and initial level, but most students see significant results in 2-3 months.

start.title: Want to get started?
start.description: Sign up now and start your first free test.

metadata.title: Pilot Trax | Pilot & Aviation Exam Preparation
metadata.description: Pilot Trax is an intelligent platform for preparing for pilot exams with detailed explanations of questions, smart review, and personalized scheduling.
